name: The White House
subject: American Labor, American Goods, and American Grit
body:
Made in America Week at the White House
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a8eaa0ded9d27dd5939a8b0f3fa2c68a2853b24f5efa5117ecc60e089b3a39861dc90e1ffd3640c240ec387145347aa52a8adbd922d2c623) It’s Made in America Week at the White House. We are highlighting the workers, farmers, and innovators that make our country great. But there is work to be done. We want to build, create, and grow more products in our country using American labor, American goods, and American grit. President Trump and his Administration are removing the burdens and regulations on American companies so that they can thrive.

#
**ICYMI: President Trump Showcases Made in America products at the White House**
On Monday, Made in America Products from all 50 states were displayed throughout the White House. The President, Vice President, Cabinet officials, Members of Congress, and other visitors toured the displays and spoke with the job creators behind the products.
[Check Out the Photo Gallery](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a8eaa0ded9d27dd58957bdcb0525781fbcfbaa2a2f082309335a5ad4353ff52eed148412e63d8ca8e6f0ff12a24704ac0addcbdbce019d53)**Vice President Pence Speaks at the 2017 Retail Advocates Summit**
Yesterday, Vice President Pence discussed President Trump's plan to unleash a new era of American opportunity and prosperity to members of the National Retail Federation. Retailers are rightly concerned about taxes, labor, and regulations. The Vice President made clear that the Administration is committed to fighting for them, _"The President and I believe we have a responsibility to usher in a new era of jobs, of growth, of opportunity, and prosperity built on American principles -- timeless American principles of growth._ " **Department of the Interior Celebrates Made in America Week**
Secretary of Interior Ryan Zinke invited outdoor and recreation businesses to Washington D.C. to showcase products Made in America.
[Watch the Video](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3ae6044277cce708ed614d5143ccf140b7847ab65ebe2496bc347a754bade79855ce3b62b7bcf479b908b0403d2d2da763c057952db1753f)
# Photo of the Day
**President Trump, Vice President Pence, and National Security Adviser Lt. Gen. H.R. McMaster have lunch with Service Members** | July 18, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)
# POTUS and VP TODAY
Today, the President has lunch with members of Congress to discuss healthcare. President Trump and Vice President Pence will also host American businesses at the White House to discuss ways to verify and protect Made in America products.

# Coming Up this week
Friday, President Trump welcomes survivors of the USS Arizona to the White House. On Saturday, President Trump will attend the USS Gerald R. Ford commissioning in Norfolk, Virginia.

---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3ae6044277cce708665ef691a0bc6d106386daec1d54ef7ed4edb51de4b8c6030739dff99173b8aebd860aaf64d4d3bbef15a0b48af53ddb) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3ae6044277cce708934fa1ecaa81967a745f5f7119bea4ba76b4ee7b8a3447142d7c889620bc62aa4e4cf92359a18364c87f346d5cb4b634) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4d7cb9da5532bd617c01a4d9beb6c36220f7dff38f41048d469cde2ab267f1dd7c276ed3bad44dd309ab5e0d281a659bf)
---

But there is work to be done. We want to build, create, and grow more products in our country using American labor, American goods, and American grit. President Trump and his Administration are removing the burdens and regulations on American companies so that they can thrive. The President, Vice President, Cabinet officials, Members of Congress, and other visitors toured the displays and spoke with the job creators behind the products. President Pence Speaks at the 2017 Retail Advocates Summit Yesterday, Vice President Pence discussed President Trump's plan to unleash a new era of American opportunity and prosperity to members of the National Retail Federation. Retailers are rightly concerned about taxes, labor, and regulations. The Vice President made clear that the Administration is committed to fighting for them, "The President and I believe we have a responsibility to usher in a new era of jobs, of growth, of opportunity, and prosperity built on American principles -- timeless American principles of growth. name: DNC War Room
subject: Derek, Trump thinks you'll "join in" on repeal:
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care for all. **Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are still trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw millions off their insurance. Add your name -- tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd")**

"http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd") [](http://my.democrats. **[http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+httpmydemocratsorgNoRepeal&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523126/4067b0a/30fb280de/7e6d7ac7/300018400/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523126/4067b0a/30fb280de/7e6d7ac4/300018400/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523126/4067b0a/30fb280de/7e6d7ac5/300018400/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523126/4067b0a/30fb280de/7e6d7ac2/300018400/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170719_dnc_nd&source=em_20170719_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Did you hear? We're giving out FREE bumper stickers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|

| | Peter,

Whether you've been with Joe since his days as school board president for Mishawaka Marian High School or are standing with him for the very first time this year, we're glad to have you with us. To thank you for your support of all the work Joe's doing to fight for Hoosiers in the Senate, we want you to be among the first to have **your very own Joe Donnelly bumper sticker -- for FREE.**

**[Click here to tell us where we can send your FREE Joe for Indiana bumper sticker!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2691/7377f838/36f0d9d3/51fb38d5/3167417777/VEsE/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/free-bumper-sticker2")** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2691/7377f838/36f0d9d3/51fb38d5/3167417777/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/free-bumper-sticker2")
---
Joe is in the Senate fighting day in and day out for us, and these new stickers are a perfect way to show you've got his back! **Peter, can you lend some space on your bumper to show you support the hardest working guy in the Senate?**

**[YES, send me my FREE Joe for Indiana bumper sticker!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2691/7377f838/36f0d9d3/51fb38d5/3167417777/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/free-bumper-sticker2")**

Thank you,

Team Donnelly

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: These women could lose:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe440a/3273020002/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe440a/3273020002/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
It's no secret that there are far too few women walking the halls of Congress -- we currently have just 16 Democratic woman Senators.
These women are fighting against the disastrous DeVos/Trump education budget, working to protect access to health care, and holding Washington Republicans accountable for putting corporate special interests ahead of families like yours.
Here's where they need your help: **Two of these women -- Senators Claire McCaskill and Heidi Heitkamp -- are running for reelection in states that Donald Trump won by TWENTY POINTS or more.**
Claire and Heidi are sure to face two of the most expensive, competitive, and negative races of 2018 and the only way they'll come out on top is with your support.**[Please give $3 or more -- every penny you can -- to Claire and Heidi's campaigns so that we can keep their strong, progressive voices in the Senate.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe440b/3273020002/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X213aDRoaC1jbWMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcxOV9NV0g0SEgtQ01DMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_mwh4hh-cmc?refcode=e20170719_MWH4HH-CMC2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Claire McCaskill, Heidi Heitkamp, and Maggie Hassan._

**[Click to donate $50.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe4476/3273020002/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X213aDRoaC1jbWMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcxOV9NV0g0SEgtQ01DMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_mwh4hh-cmc?refcode=e20170719_MWH4HH-CMC2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe440b/3273020002/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X213aDRoaC1jbWMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcxOV9NV0g0SEgtQ01DMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_mwh4hh-cmc?refcode=e20170719_MWH4HH-CMC2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
With such resounding Trump victories in Claire and Heidi's states of Missouri and North Dakota, corporate special interests and shady outside groups see these seats as must-wins. They're going to spend as much as they can smearing Claire and Heidi, all to elect two more rubberstamps for the reckless Trump agenda.
**We can't let that happen, everyone.**
Use this link to give what you can so that we can stop corporate special interests from buying these seats and knocking off two critically important Democratic woman Senators: [**http://act.maggiehassan.com/elect-Democratic-women**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe440b/3273020002/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X213aDRoaC1jbWMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcxOV9NV0g0SEgtQ01DMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_mwh4hh-cmc?refcode=e20170719_MWH4HH-CMC2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you for supporting women,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecf/2a380d31/19553b1d/fe440b/3273020002/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X213aDRoaC1jbWMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDcxOV9NV0g0SEgtQ01DMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_mwh4hh-cmc?refcode=e20170719_MWH4HH-CMC2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: Not what you voted for…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
ObamaCare has to go. NOW. |
---
| | |

Peter,

You voted to repeal ObamaCare.

President Trump wants to deliver on that promise. He is eager to rip ObamaCare to shreds, but some in the Senate are refusing to even put a _simple_ repeal bill on his desk.

As your RNC Chairwoman, it's my job to represent you, fight for you, and make sure your voice is heard loud and clear.

That's why I've gone on TV to say that if our elected officials don't pass what you voted for, we could lose the midterm elections. Peter, I don't want that to happen._I want to win_. Most importantly, I want the people of our country to win.

**I 'm going to give President Trump a MASSIVE list of all the American voters who want ObamaCare repealed. He'll show that list to any Senate Republican who refuses to pass our repeal bill. Will you add your name?

[Sign our petition: TELL THE SENATE THAT YOU -- THE AMERICAN VOTER -- WANT OBAMACARE ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e87373677eb61280bee4aee0d2f1d5a035c9f006607b2b52f55ea1683e99b0ab2fd14f313db93041e9c958f2610ebc31953d)****[REPEALED](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e87373677eb61280bee4aee0d2f1d5a035c9f006607b2b52f55ea1683e99b0ab2fd14f313db93041e9c958f2610ebc31953d)** **[>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e87373677eb61280bee4aee0d2f1d5a035c9f006607b2b52f55ea1683e99b0ab2fd14f313db93041e9c958f2610ebc31953d)**

---
**TELL THE SENATE: REPEAL OBAMACARE** **Account Name:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e8733807564c675ff8662093d19ff3ad09005fed7c161f8e198ed08d1111678fb48008107f6f0dd88b8420e2031e4c1d42da)** **Signature:** **PENDING**
[ **ADD YOUR NAME**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e87378d58739876af4badea7b74c4b8022bb7731359f7705bf4db941b069459d6f652316a4910c751bc00762618e865541e4)
---

Thanks,

[ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e8733d31179ecd89c034f18ce3fedd3e1febd992d47b5eb7483b36fdf32b63ca94990771b5d8c92e82174b9feeedf6863b0a)
Ronna McDaniel
Chairwoman, RNC
**[@GOPChairwoman](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e873396ece8d559f7a7980ec991c994dc8258f31176e30cba92f150014b3f75776c47b586b3728a4215a900915ca214aaf1f)**

---

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e8735ae47627d8e8d9539c9990aba7e79795b958f7bb342753517b6579420f6376a5112ad28453a7db27a6504598348aaf34) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e8738989e790935a7dfc05a3345d60212144075fffb4f258308a7b71e4c6b701deb1806f665218efaf3cbc61cc58e65b5e98) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5439c1287720e873321ee1bb317a293de9a044724e75759513dc60f77db6516ccd113f56416c09e18d194588ae0c0090423e2a9ba2b115f5) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d484618c49080ee8db7a1791a0f7d83609f672f34bf35ffaf019406a4a901e7504b3c)
---
clean_body: ObamaCare has to go. NOW. | | | | Peter, You voted to repeal ObamaCare. President Trump wants to deliver on that promise. He is eager to rip ObamaCare to shreds, but some in the Senate are refusing to even put a simple repeal bill on his desk. As your RNC Chairwoman, it's my job to represent you, fight for you, and make sure your voice is heard loud and clear. That's why I've gone on TV to say that if our elected officials don't pass what you voted for, we could lose the midterm elections. Peter, I don't want that to happen.I want to win. Most importantly, I want the people of our country to win. I 'm going to give President Trump a MASSIVE list of all the American voters who want ObamaCare repealed. He'll show that list to any Senate Republican who refuses to pass our repeal bill. Will you add your name? TELL THE SENATE: REPEAL OBAMACARE Account Name: Signature: PENDING Thanks, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, RNC Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Senator Dan Blue
subject: Now the real work starts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d77/2fde7c66/453d0331/15696a2f/3642723717/VEsH/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_content=1")
---
Friends,

Yesterday, Governor Cooper and the NC Democratic Party launched Break the Majority.

This is big deal, friend.

After years of Republican supermajorities in both chambers, this is a once in a generation chance to fix what's gone wrong in North Carolina.

If we allow the current Republicans to draw new legislative maps in 2020, it will set us back years. We can't afford that.

**[Break the Majority is a coordinated effort to recruit strong candidates and give them the tools they need to succeed in these elections. I'm all in on Break the Majority -- but we need your support to really be successful. Join us today!](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d77/2fde7c66/453d0331/15696a2e/3642723717/VEsE/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_content=2+-+Break+the+Majority+is+a+coordinated+effo")**

We know now more than ever that politics is a one-on-one game and we have to focus at the grassroots level. We must engage folks at the precinct and county levels.

That means talking to our neighbors at the barbershop and supermarkets, letting them know that Democrats represent their best interests.

Roy Cooper's election represented a real turning point in North Carolina's history -- but now the real work starts.

**[Join Break the Majority today and let's get to work!](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d77/2fde7c66/453d0331/15696a21/3642723717/VEsF/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_content=3+-+Join+Break+the+Majority+today+and+lets+g")**

Thanks for your help,

Senator Dan Blue
Senate Democratic Leader
| | [**I'm in ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d77/2fde7c66/453d0331/15696a20/3642723717/VEsC/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&utm_content=4+-+Im+in+rarr")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d77/2fde7c66/453d0331/15696a23/3642723717/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=5+-+httpactroycoopercomunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB&source=em17_17071_btm2_acq_gq_ful__DB")

After years of Republican supermajorities in both chambers, this is a once in a generation chance to fix what's gone wrong in North Carolina. If we allow the current Republicans to draw new legislative maps in 2020, it will set us back years. We can't afford that. "" We know now more than ever that politics is a one-on-one game and we have to focus at the grassroots level. We must engage folks at the precinct and county levels. That means talking to our neighbors at the barbershop and supermarkets, letting them know that Democrats represent their best interests. Roy Cooper's election represented a real turning point in North Carolina's history -- but now the real work starts. "" Thanks for your help, Senator Dan Blue Senate Democratic Leader | | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

name: Jason Kander
subject: Shut. It. Down.
body:
Enough is enough. **Add your name: tell Trump to shut down his sham "voter fraud" commission right now.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd")**
Derek --

A few weeks ago, Donald Trump's "voter fraud" commission, led by Mike Pence and voter suppression kingpin Kris Kobach, took an unprecedented step to help prove Trump's biggest lie -- that millions of Americans illegally voted in the 2016 election.

Pence and Kobach demanded that each state hand over its records for every voter, including personal information, party registration, and voting history.

We knew from the beginning that this commission was nothing more than a way for Trump and the GOP to make it harder for people to vote. **[This request makes it clear as day that this sham commission must be shut down.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+This+request+makes+it+clear+as+day+that+&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd")**

Voting is our most important constitutional right, and how we exercise that right is deeply personal. Who you vote for, and when and how you cast your ballot, is certainly not the business of this commission.

Almost every state has refused to hand over this information, but the idea that it might happen has already started pushing people away from the polls -- you almost have to wonder if that was the plan the whole time.

And with this dangerous administration and GOP-controlled Congress, the last thing we need is for fewer people to vote.

**It's time for Donald Trump to stop playing games with the right to vote and shut down this ludicrous commission once and for all. Add your name if you agree:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Shut-It-Down1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd")**
Thanks,

Jason

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052313d/4067b0a/30e1d1b22/7e6d60e8/3644544673/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052313d/4067b0a/30e1d1b22/7e6d60e9/3644544673/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052313d/4067b0a/30e1d1b22/7e6d60f6/3644544673/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052313d/4067b0a/30e1d1b22/7e6d60f7/3644544673/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170719_jk_nd&source=em_20170719_jk_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Hi, I'm Emily
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d651/1441748202/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact")
---

Peter,

When I called my dad to tell him I'd just been endorsed by EMILY's List a few years back, I wasn't sure he'd know what that meant.

"EMILY's List? Of course I know it!" he said. "I'm a pro-choice Democrat, and my daughter's name is Emily."

Safe to say, he was pretty excited when he got another call from me about EMILY's List a few weeks ago -- to let him know I'd just accepted the job to be executive director.

From my decade as a state legislator to when I ran for Congress (twice!), this community has supported me throughout my political career. To give back to EMILY's List at such a critical juncture is the opportunity of a lifetime. It's an honor, and needless to say, I am so excited to be here.

**[We're going to do some incredible things together, and I'm ready to get started now. Donate $3 to elect pro-choice Democratic women, defeat Republicans, and train more women to run for office than ever before.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d652/1441748202/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170718_email_WelcomeEmilyCain?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Were+going+to+do+some+incredible+things+&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact")**

A bit more about me:

My dad -- the EMILY's List fan -- is a shoe salesman and my mom is a sign language interpreter. I'm the oldest of three sisters (so you could say I have some experience supporting women). Growing up, my family moved around a lot, but when we got to Maine, we knew we'd found home. I met my husband, Danny, at the University of Maine, and I've lived in Maine most of my life.

That's where I first ran for office when I was 24. I served five terms in the state legislature, chairing the Appropriations Committee and serving as the youngest woman to be the House Minority Leader in Maine history. During the 2012 elections, I worked hard to recruit top female candidates who helped Democrats take back the Maine House, and then I served in the Maine Senate from 2012 to 2014.

I wish I could tell you that it was smooth sailing from there, but the truth of politics is that if the sailing is smooth, you probably aren't taking risks.

I ran for Congress in 2014 and 2016 in a top-tier red-to-blue House seat, and while I didn't win, I know the power of having EMILY's List in your corner. I learned a lot along the way, and you can bet I'm bringing those lessons to EMILY's List.

I can't wait to use my experiences to help the more than 16,000 women who've reached out about running for office. And I look forward to hearing your thoughts and ideas about the races you want EMILY's List to focus on most as we gear up for what I'm sure will be an incredible election cycle.

**I'm excited to dive right in and get to work. Are you with me?**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Diving-In](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d653/1441748202/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170718_email_WelcomeEmilyCain?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDivingIn&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact")**

Thanks,

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d64c/1441748202/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170718_email_WelcomeEmilyCain?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d64d/1441748202/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d64e/1441748202/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6436/24c69fd9/c8867861/1899d64f/1441748202/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact&source=WQEFE719N_digital_email_20170719_EmilyCainIntro_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Team Donnelly
subject: three of a kind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367c/1394212438/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | **Messer, Rokita, and Delph: None of them make the grade
[Chip in $5 now to keep Joe in the Senate fighting for you >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367f/1394212438/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-threeofakind?refcode=20170719nd?amount=10")**
| [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367f/1394212438/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-threeofakind?refcode=20170719nd?amount=10")
---
Peter,

The Republican primary to take on Joe might be 10 months away, but it's already getting ugly. The three main contenders -- Congressman Luke Messer, Congressman Todd Rokita and State Senator Mike Delph -- are already hurling wild personal attacks and competing to see who can pander to GOP extremists the most.

It's hardly surprising. Messer, Rokita and Delph know that **the winner of this bizarre pageant will be the beneficiary of a record-shattering wave of spending from Republican dark money groups.** Meanwhile, Joe is doing what he does best: working hard to get things done and fighting for things like the Affordable Care Act, fair pay, and voting rights in Washington.

**[But Peter, Joe needs your help. Can you chip in $5 to Joe's campaign to keep him in the Senate fighting for us?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367f/1394212438/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-threeofakind?refcode=20170719nd?amount=10")**

Exactly who are these guys? Congressman Messer has been described as "one of Trump's biggest cheerleaders" and spent his early years working for the Koch brothers (now big funders of his campaigns).

Congressman Rokita is a climate change denier who's spent his career voting for party interests, not Hoosier values. **They both voted to strip over 300,000 Hoosiers of their health care.** And Delph? He's thinks there's plenty of room to run to the _right_ of Messer and Rokita -- as if they weren't extreme enough!

**One thing 's for sure: When it comes to fighting for Hoosiers in Washington, they all get a failing grade. [Pitch in now to help re-elect Joe and keep him in the Senate, fighting for us >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367f/1394212438/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-threeofakind?refcode=20170719nd?amount=10")**

\-- Team Donnelly

PS -- It's going to take everything we've got to fight back against the coming spending onslaught. **But Joe has something better than billionaire donors -- he has grassroots supporters like you.[Can you stand with Joe and chip in $5 today?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367f/1394212438/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-threeofakind?refcode=20170719nd?amount=10")**

** **
**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367f/1394212438/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-threeofakind?refcode=20170719nd?amount=10")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c269b/7377f838/370a6931/51fb367e/1394212438/VEsO/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

Congressman Messer has been described as "one of Trump's biggest cheerleaders" and spent his early years working for the Koch brothers (now big funders of his campaigns). Congressman Rokita is a climate change denier who's spent his career voting for party interests, not Hoosier values. They both voted to strip over 300,000 Hoosiers of their health care. And Delph? He's thinks there's plenty of room to run to the right of Messer and Rokita -- as if they weren't extreme enough! One thing 's for sure: When it comes to fighting for Hoosiers in Washington, they all get a failing grade. "" \-- Team Donnelly PS -- It's going to take everything we've got to fight back against the coming spending onslaught. But Joe has something better than billionaire donors -- he has grassroots supporters like you. "" "" | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

name: Team Maggie
subject: update re. voter suppression attempts (signature needed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecc/2a380d31/1942e08f/fe4490/1780208942/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecc/2a380d31/1942e08f/fe4490/1780208942/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Our government is founded on the idea that everyone deserves a voice.
For decades, Americans have fought, marched, and spoken up for the idea that all citizens should have a say in our government. Simply put, the right to vote is at the center of our democracy.
But now, without a shred of evidence of widespread voter fraud, Donald Trump has created a "Commission on Election Integrity."
**Let 's be clear here: this is nothing but a shallow attempt to suppress voters, specifically low income voters, the elderly, those who experience disabilities, and people of color.**
[**We can 't let Trump get away with a nationwide campaign of voter suppression. Add your name to tell Republicans: Stop attacking voting rights!**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecc/2a380d31/1942e08f/fe4491/1780208942/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectthevote/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_votingrightsja")
Thank you for standing up for the fundamental right to vote.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecc/2a380d31/1942e08f/fe4492/1780208942/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN192b3RpbmdyaWdodHNqYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNzE3X3ZvdGluZ3JpZ2h0c2phX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_votingrightsja?refcode=e20170717_votingrightsja_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdecc/2a380d31/1942e08f/fe4493/1780208942/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Working people deserve a champion
body:
#
Team --
Some people have asked, what right does Andrew Gillum have to run for Governor of the State of Florida? My answer is simple:
I have as much of a right as anyone to dream bigger for the future of my state. I have the right to believe that the son of a bus driver and a construction worker is as capable as anyone else to offer a vision for where we can go as a state.
In fact, I know that my life reflects the experiences and stories of so many working people in Florida.
I know the importance of protecting and expanding access to affordable healthcare, because as a kid I grew up sometimes getting my regular care in the emergency room.
I know the importance of access to high quality public education, because that's the only way I was able to break my family's cycle of intergenerational poverty.
I know what a difference our public school teachers make in children's lives, because they're the ones who dared me to dream bigger and made it possible for me to email you today as a candidate for Governor.
I know the importance of creating jobs that pay a living wage, because even with both of my parents working full time when I was growing up, sometimes we still couldn't afford to make ends meet.
These experiences make me uniquely qualified to become Florida's next Governor - because I know that too many working people in this state are facing the same struggles I've had in my life.
When nearly half our state's households say they're struggling to make ends meet, our public schools are being chronically underfunded by the Republican Legislature, and working people can't get ahead, we need a real champion for everyday people in Florida.
Together we can show this state that you don't have to come from a famous family, or have the ability to write your own check to offer your services to the state that we all love. But only if we're willing to come together and give this campaign our all, which is why I'm asking:
[**Will you chip in to our campaign to give working people a voice and a champion in Florida?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f6/9e00690/4df48420/24036192/2799618419/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170719-right")
With your help, we'll show the world that we have a right to lead and imagine a state where we are all valued and have the opportunity at a better life, no matter where we come from or the balance in our bank account.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f6/9e00690/4df48420/24036192/2799618419/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170719-right")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f6/9e00690/4df48420/24036195/2799618419/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f6/9e00690/4df48420/24036194/2799618419/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f6/9e00690/4df48420/24036197/2799618419/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
